critical_violations: SIMIS-001: Role derived from user.user_metadata.role — user-editable field used for authorization.
SIMIS-002: SSE /telemetry/stream has while(true) loop with no abort signal check.
top_risks: user_metadata RBAC allows privilege escalation by any authenticated user
SQLite/Postgres split makes MVP layer invisible to EventQueueLog and traceId
SSE infinite loop without abort check causes memory leak on every connection
top_optimizations: Implement checkSemanticCache with pgvector to reduce LLM API costs by ~30-60%
Add BullMQ removeOnComplete/removeOnFail to prevent Redis memory exhaustion
Add EventQueueLog.status index to fix slow metrics queries

issue_catalog.description: Role derived from user.user_metadata.role — user-editable field used for authorization.
issue_catalog.impact: Any authenticated user can escalate to ADMIN role by setting user_metadata.role = "admin".
issue_catalog.root_cause: Supabase user_metadata is writable by users. Should use app_metadata (server-controlled).
issue_catalog.recommended_fix: Replace user.user_metadata.role with user.app_metadata?.role in permission_guard.ts.

issue_catalog.description: SSE /telemetry/stream has while(true) loop with no abort signal check.
issue_catalog.impact: Memory leak: every client connection keeps a live timer and stream handle after disconnect.
issue_catalog.root_cause: Missing c.req.raw.signal.aborted guard (correctly implemented in mvp.ts:174).

issue_catalog.location: apps/api/src/routers/mvp.ts, apps/api/src/services/ad_auction_engine.ts, apps/api/src/services/api_engine.ts, apps/api/src/services/curation_engine.ts, apps/api/src/services/editorial_engine.ts, apps/api/src/services/feed_engine.ts, apps/api/src/services/ingestion.ts, apps/api/src/services/revenue_engine.ts, apps/api/src/services/rss_engine.ts, apps/api/src/services/ugc_engine.ts
issue_catalog.description: 10 service(s) write to SQLite store instead of PostgreSQL/EventQueueLog.
issue_catalog.impact: MVP post CRUD operations are invisible to traceId, EventQueueLog, and BullMQ workers.
issue_catalog.root_cause: MVP layer predates v3.x event-driven architecture and was never migrated.
issue_catalog.recommended_fix: Migrate apps/api/src/store/sqlite_db.ts reads/writes to Prisma PostgreSQL. Route mutations through EventQueueLog.

issue_catalog.description: checkSemanticCache() always returns null — semantic deduplication is non-functional.
issue_catalog.impact: Every AI task triggers a live LLM API call regardless of prior identical inputs. 100% LLM cost with no cache savings.
issue_catalog.root_cause: Placeholder left during initial implementation; pgvector integration not completed.
issue_catalog.recommended_fix: Implement cosine similarity search: SELECT ... ORDER BY embedding <=> $1 LIMIT 1 using Prisma+pgvector.

issue_catalog.description: BullMQ workers have no removeOnComplete or removeOnFail configuration.
issue_catalog.impact: Completed/failed jobs accumulate in Redis indefinitely, eventually exhausting memory.
issue_catalog.root_cause: Default BullMQ behavior retains all job records unless explicitly configured.
issue_catalog.recommended_fix: Add { removeOnComplete: { count: 1000 }, removeOnFail: { count: 500 } } to both Worker constructors.

issue_catalog.description: EventQueueLog has no index on status column.
issue_catalog.impact: GET /api/admin/metrics queries WHERE status = "QUEUED" — full table scan without index.
issue_catalog.root_cause: New fields (traceId, actor, source, mode) were indexed but status was missed.
issue_catalog.recommended_fix: Add @@index([status]) to EventQueueLog model, then run: prisma migrate dev --name add-event-status-index

issue_catalog.description: Quota INCRBY followed by separate EXPIRE is not atomic — race condition possible.
issue_catalog.impact: Under concurrent load, the quota key may never get an expiry set, leading to permanent quota exhaustion.
issue_catalog.root_cause: Two separate Redis commands with no transaction or Lua script.
issue_catalog.recommended_fix: Replace with: await redis.set(key, 1, "EX", 86400, "NX") or use Lua SET+EXPIRE atomically.

issue_catalog.description: ControlOrchestrator.logAudit() only calls console.log — no persistence.
issue_catalog.impact: All legacy admin action audit records are lost on process restart. No forensic trail.
issue_catalog.root_cause: Database insertion was left as a TODO comment during initial implementation.
issue_catalog.recommended_fix: Create control_audits Prisma model and call prisma.controlAudit.create() in logAudit().

issue_catalog.description: LLMCallLog.cost is typed as Float (IEEE 754 binary float).
issue_catalog.impact: Financial cost calculations using Float suffer from precision errors (e.g., 0.1 + 0.2 ≠ 0.3).
issue_catalog.root_cause: Float was used for simplicity; Decimal was not considered during initial schema design.
issue_catalog.recommended_fix: Change to: cost Decimal @db.Decimal(10,6) and regenerate Prisma client.

drivers: SSE memory leak in legacy admin
no circuit breaker on AI Router
traceId not propagated in MVP/SQLite path
